content: Set up Cargo.toml with dependencies and project structure
Create core type system (SplineType enum, Spline trait, error types)
Port core C algorithms (basis_funcs, evaluate, diff_table) to Rust
Implement splineDesign / design matrix functionality
Implement basic BSpline struct with new() and predict() methods
Fix algorithm issues causing NaN values in basis functions
Implement NaturalSpline extending B-spline functionality
Create XYVector utility struct (R xyVector equivalent)
Implement R's exact knot construction for InterpolationSpline
Implement R's exact constraint setup for InterpolationSpline
Create R ground truth script for 6x6 matrix generation
Add matrix debugging to Rust InterpolationSpline
Perform systematic matrix comparison element-by-element
Fix DesignMatrixBuilder second derivative implementation
Fix DesignMatrixBuilder basis function evaluation with full knot vector
Achieve perfect coefficient calculation matching R exactly
Resolve tiny evaluation precision issue (0.01667 vs 0.0)
Fix non-square matrix issues for different spline orders
Run comprehensive InterpolationSpline tests
Clean up debug output and finalize implementation
Fix right boundary condition bug in B-spline evaluation
Add intercept parameter to BSpline to match R's bs(intercept=FALSE)
Verify full BSpline equivalence with R's bs() function
Implement periodic splines for cyclic data
